sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: The cave_system changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Population: 27. Underground cave system located. I spent the year on coding. Closest to Lyra.
The cave_system changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 92): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
